advice.summary: You are maintaining a balanced training routine with a mix of running and weight training. Your recent sessions show good adherence to your training plan.
advice.focus: Continue to incorporate both aerobic runs and strength training to build endurance and strength.
advice.nextSession: Plan for an easy aerobic run of about 8-10 km to maintain your endurance.
advice.caution: Monitor your heart rate during workouts to ensure you are not overexerting, especially during high-intensity sessions.
